meta.collection_method: Tavily-first weekly refresh, with official-source screening and conservative deduplication. This file is a retrospective candidate pool for the 2026-07-19 refresh.
meta.notes: This file stores the candidates reviewed during the 2026-07-19 weekly refresh. The four retained items were net-new enough to merge into the formal leaderboard; the rest of the search results were either duplicates, older than the weekly window, or too weak to keep as candidate records.

items.title: 从 adoption 到 impact：AI 转型的三个层次
items.summary: McKinsey 基于全球调研指出，组织要从个人采纳走向企业级价值捕获，关键在于重构工作流、重新设计岗位，并围绕 AI 可能创造最大价值的环节推进转型。
items.why_it_matters: 这是很典型的 AI 思考力信号，也能作为 McKinsey 长期转型底座的补强证据。
items.merge_rationale: Already merged into the formal leaderboard as a long-term thought-leadership baseline in this refresh.

items.title: 重构客户体验：agentic era 下的 CX
items.summary: McKinsey 指出，随着 AI agents 参与实时决策，领先企业正在把客户体验从预设旅程重构为动态的跨渠道编排。
items.why_it_matters: 这类内容把 AI 直接连接到经营与增长模式，属于很有价值的 leadership thought。
items.merge_rationale: Already merged into the formal leaderboard as a long-term thought-leadership baseline in this refresh.

items.title: Rewired takes：规模化 AI 采纳的实战经验
items.summary: McKinsey Senior Partner Brooke Weddle 讨论企业如何从试点走向规模化，强调 workflow redesign、operating model、领导力和文化。
items.why_it_matters: 它更像是对企业 AI 转型的行动指南，而不只是观点摘要。
items.merge_rationale: Already merged into the formal leaderboard as a long-term thought-leadership baseline in this refresh.

items.title: 你不能站在场边领导 AI
items.summary: McKinsey 指出 AI 已经从实验阶段进入运营现实，领导者需要亲自使用 AI 才能重塑工作方式、建立信任并推动规模化价值。
items.why_it_matters: 它强化了麦肯锡在领导力和组织变革上的公开思考。
items.merge_rationale: Already merged into the formal leaderboard as a long-term thought-leadership baseline in this refresh.

items.title: Accenture 帮助欧盟 DG INTPA 将 AI Assistant 扩展到全球运营
items.summary: Accenture 于 2026-07-15 官方披露其为 European Commission DG INTPA 设计、构建并规模化 AI Assistant，服务已覆盖总部及全球 delegations，并形成 2,000+ regular users 与 400,000+ queries 的使用规模。
items.why_it_matters: 这是本周最强的 production-grade client proof 之一，说明 Accenture 已经把 AI 交付沉到真实运营环境。
items.merge_rationale: Net-new official client proof within the weekly window; strong enough to merge into the formal leaderboard.

items.title: PwC 与 OpenAI 推出 agentic customer engagement and service 方案
items.summary: PwC US 于 2026-07-15 官方宣布推出与 OpenAI 共建的 agentic contact and service solutions，把营销、销售、commerce 与 service 放进同一个 AI-enabled operating model，并设立专门的 Center of Excellence 加速客户部署。
items.why_it_matters: 这是本周最强的官方合作与交付信号之一，兼具合作深度和客户落地意味。
items.merge_rationale: Net-new official partnership within the weekly window; strong enough to merge into the formal leaderboard.

items.title: BCG 发布 Mid-2026 M&A Insights：AI drives a recovery, but questions remain
items.summary: BCG 于 2026-07-15 发布最新并购洞察，明确指出 AI 正在重塑竞争格局并驱动并购回暖。虽然主题落在 M&A，但核心论点是企业正因 AI 带来的能力重构与估值分化而加速交易决策。
items.why_it_matters: 这是时间明确、主题聚焦 AI 的官方 thought leadership 信号，能强化 BCG 在管理层研究上的存在感。
items.merge_rationale: Net-new official research within the weekly window; strong enough to merge into the formal leaderboard.

items.title: Oliver Wyman Forum 发布 The industrial AI divide
items.summary: Oliver Wyman Forum 于 2026-07-14 发布交通、物流与国防行业 AI 竞争分化报告，强调 AI 已从 productivity tools 走向 operating-model-level advantage，并提出数据、治理、人才与董事会参与等企业级要求。
items.why_it_matters: 这是明确的周内 thought leadership 信号，说明 Oliver Wyman 仍在用行业研究塑造 AI 叙事。
items.merge_rationale: Net-new official research within the weekly window; strong enough to merge into the formal leaderboard.
